Clean up README documentation

author: ismai117
message:
Merge pull request #50 from ismai117/api-redesign

Redesign public API for type safety and clarity

author: ismail.mohamed
message:
Redesign public API for type safety and clarity

Breaking changes:
- Replace KottieCompositionResult with sealed KottieComposition type
  (Loading, Success, Failure) for exhaustive when expressions
- Move all public API to `kottie` package
- Rename KottieAnimationState.iterations to iteration (singular)
- Remove minWidth/minHeight parameters from KottieAnimation

API improvements:
- Add KDoc documentation to all public APIs
- Add extension properties: isSuccess, isLoading, isFailure, errorOrNull
- Hide internal implementation in kottie.internal package
- Remove unused Controllers.kt and utility functions
- Fix bug: SkiaComposition.kt was calling success() on errors

Cleanup:
- Delete duplicate internal specs (SkiaCompositionSpec, LottieCompositionSpec)
- Consolidate animation state classes into single KottieAnimationState
- Share Skia implementation across JVM, JS, and WASM targets
- Fix malformed filename (rememberkottieComposition(.kt)
- Update sample app to use new API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
